name: license-checker-ai
description: License Checker Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: identify_license
tools.description: Identify the license type from license text content.

tools.name: check_compatibility
tools.description: Check if two licenses are compatible for combining code.

tools.name: explain_terms
tools.description: Explain the key terms and obligations of a license in plain language.
